name: consent self-service positive path test missing profileId args
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-08] positive path only confirms requestConsent called, not that IDs match the calling profile. Fix: assert toHaveBeenCalledWith specific IDs.
acceptanceCriteria:
Root cause: the consent self-service positive-path test only asserts that requestConsent was called, so route code could pass the test while sending the wrong calling profile/account/consent identifiers.
Variants:
- Self-service positive path where childProfileId equals the active profile and the route returns 201.
- Adjacent denial paths are out of scope unless touched; this item is specifically the positive-path argument assertion gap.
Regression: strengthen apps/api/src/routes/consent.test.ts so the positive self-service test fails when mockRequestConsent receives the wrong profile/account/consent args and passes only when the expected IDs from the request/auth context are forwarded.
